title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Shriram Finance Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Shriram Finance Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Shriram Finance Holdings Services in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Shriram Finance Holdings Services:
Shriram Finance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
